violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed open ceiling with exposed insulation in storage room.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed raw meats removed from orginal package was not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed filters in hood system contained build up debris.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. No handwashing sink provided.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed large crack along the full cooking area. Large carpet type mat was used to cover most of crack. Carpet mat is not a smooth, cleanable surface. Floor is not constructed in a smooth cleanable surface.
